MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Debug.Name: Log fixed Active Effect keys
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Debug.Hint: Print every corrected Active Effect key to the console.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Verbose.Name: Verbose logging
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Verbose.Hint: Print all Active Effect keys inspected by this module, including keys that were not changed.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.ActiveEffects.Name: Active Effects
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.ActiveEffects.Hint: Logging and diagnostics for Active Effect key fixes.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.CPR.Name: Cauldron of Plentiful Resources
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.CPR.Label: Configure
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.CPR.Hint: Compatibility fixes for localized CPR item lookup and warnings.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.SkillTree.Name: Skill Tree
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.SkillTree.Label: Configure
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Menus.SkillTree.Hint: Synchronization of Skill Tree pages from linked items.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.FixCPRLookup.Hi: Let Cauldron of Plentiful Resources find automations for bilingual names such as 'Сглаз / Hex'.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.SuppressCPRWarn: Hide known false CPR warnings, currently the Fire Shield tour lookup warning.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.SkillTreeSyncNa: Keep the Skill Tree page name aligned with the first linked item name.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.SkillTreeSyncIm: Keep the Skill Tree page image aligned with the first linked item image.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.SkillTreeSyncDe: Keep the Skill Tree page description aligned with the first linked item description.
